title: Miso-Glazed Crisp Mexican Tofu Churro Fritters
description: Funky, crispy tofu churros smothered in a rich miso glaze, perfect for a date-night treat. Serve warm and enjoy with a side of spicy salsa.
instructions: Preheat a tava or griddle over medium-high heat.
Cut the tofu into long, thin strips and pat dry with paper towels.
In a shallow dish, mix together flour, confectioners' sugar, cumin, and cayenne pepper.
Dip each tofu strip into the flour mixture, coating evenly.
Heat about 1/4 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry the tofu churros in batches until golden and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the churros on paper towels and repeat with the remaining tofu strips.
To make the miso glaze, whisk together miso paste, agave nectar, and lime juice in a small bowl.
Brush the miso glaze over the fried tofu churros and serve warm.
Garnish with sliced poblanos and serve immediately.
